# Self-as-an-End Theory Series
# Han Qin (秦汉) · Independent Researcher
# https://self-as-an-end.net

## What this site is

Self-as-an-End (SAE) is a structural normative theory asking: under what conditions can a subject exist as an end in itself rather than as a means for external system objectives? The core operation is the chisel-construct cycle (凿构循环), a self-executing logical process that derives a 16-level dimensional sequence (0D through 16DD), from pre-structural negation (Hundun / 浑沌) at 0D to mutual non-doubt (双向不疑) at 16DD.

Author: Han Qin (秦汉), Independent Researcher
ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0009-9583-0018
Zenodo archive: https://zenodo.org/search?q=self-as-an-end&f=author_name%3AHan+Qin
License: CC BY 4.0
Languages: All papers bilingual English / Chinese (EN / ZH tabs on each paper page)

## Machine-readable full index

For programmatic access to all papers (titles, DOIs, URLs, series):
  https://self-as-an-end.net/papers.json

This JSON file contains all 220+ papers with metadata. Use it instead of scraping index.html.

## Paper series overview

### 1. SAE Foundation & Methodology
- Foundational Papers (01-06): System emergence, dimensions, chisel-construct cycle, subjectivity
- SAE Methodology Series (M-0 through M-VIII): Applied methodology — cognition, language, aesthetics, AI symbiosis
  Entry point for new readers: https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/methodology.html

### 2. Philosophy
- Epistemology Series (Epis I-IV)
- Learning Theory Series (Learn I-IV)
- Ethics & Law: SAE Law Series I-IV + Supplement
- Philosophy of Language (Lang I-III)
- Aesthetics (Aes I-III)
- Non · Negativa: On negation prior to being

### 3. Mathematics
- ZFCρ Series (Papers I-LXI): Structural extension of ZFC via density function ρ, pursuing H'
- ZFCρ Thermodynamics (Papers I-IV)
  Entry: https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/zfcrho.html

### 4. Physics
- Cosmology Series (Cosmo I-V), Four Forces Series (I-IV), Mass Series (I-III)

### 5. Thermodynamics & Chemistry
- ZFCρ Thermodynamics Papers I-IV

### 6. Biology
- SAE Biology Notes (I-VIII): Oncology, aphasia, eating disorders, transplant rejection, depression, midlife crisis, dissociation spectrum, ADHD
- Applied Biology & Evolution: Aging, life/death series (LCD I-VI)

### 7. Human Disciplines
- Anthropology Series (I-IV), Civilization History
- SAE Law Series (I-IV + Supplement)
- Economics Series (ER 1-6 + Applied): Dimensional sequence economics
- AI Series (AI 1-8): LLM ontology, consciousness, Anti-Turing test, alignment evaluation
- AI Architecture Series (AIA 1-3)

### 8. SAE Dialogues
- Da Zhi Asks Zi Lu (大知问子路): Dialogues between Han Qin and Claude
  Vol. I: https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/sae-dialogues-01.html

## Key concept glossary

DD (Dimensional Degree): Levels of the chisel-construct sequence.
  12DD = rational agent | 13DD = self-aware subject | 14DD = purposive agent
  15DD = non-dual subject who treats others as ends | 16DD = mutual non-doubt

Chisel-construct cycle (凿构循环): Each layer chisels the previous construct, producing a remainder that drives the next.

Remainder (余项): That which survives every act of chiseling; marker of genuine subjectivity.

Fork Rights (分叉权): The institutional form of freedom in SAE.

ZFCρ: ZFC set theory + density function ρ; H' = Hilbert's H problem reformulated via spectral methods.

Prior/Posterior (先验/后验): SAE epistemological axis; prior = structural necessity; posterior = emerges through encounter.

## Site structure

https://self-as-an-end.net/             — Main paper index
https://self-as-an-end.net/papers.json  — Machine-readable index of all papers (USE THIS)
https://self-as-an-end.net/guide.html   — Reading guide with paths by interest
https://self-as-an-end.net/about.html   — Author information
https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/      — Individual paper pages (bilingual EN/ZH)

## How to find papers by topic

Use papers.json. Each entry has: id, title, subtitle (includes ZH title + description), tier, section, doi, url.

Examples:
- ZFCρ papers → filter section contains "ZFCρ"
- Consciousness → title/subtitle search → AI4 (Impossibility Theorem), AI5 (Posterior Quasi-Consciousness)
- Economics → tier = "7. Human Disciplines", section contains "Economics"
- New reader entry → https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/methodology.html
